LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JUL-19-2022 HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS GREAT WALL CONSTRUCTION CO., ALAN LEUNG, AND PAK LEUNG'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR FOR NONCOMPLIANCE WITH CODE CIV. PROC. SECTION 430.41, WHICH REQUIRES COUNSEL TO MEET AND CONFER IN PERSON OR BY TELEPHONE BEFORE A DEMURRER IS FILED. ALL COUNSEL ARE ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH CODE CIV. PROC. SEC. 430.41. DEFENDANTS' RESPONSE TO THE COMPLAINT IS NOW DUE BY AUGUST 2, 2022. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)
